name: Sony WH-1000XM6
positives: Quick Attention and location-based listening settings
Blocks engines, cabin noise, and chatty passengers
32 hours battery life with ANC on
Excellent passive isolation across frequency range
Multi-device pairing: connect to computer and smartphone
31 hours continuous battery life with ANC on
Wirelessly or via cable, virtually no latency
Warm sound emphasizing thump, customizable EQ options
Companion app for robust sound customization
Top ANC performance in isolation charts
Outstanding noise isolation from rumble to whine
Lightweight design with comfortable earpads
negatives: Not ideal for large ears, small ear cups.
10 kHz spike in frequency response hard to EQ.

Shallow ear cups fail to seal for glasses wearers.
positives_detail: Features Quick Attention transparency mode and location-based listening settings.
Blocks rumbling bus engines, plane cabin din, chatty passengers, and squeaky brakes with combined ANC and passive isolation.
Battery lasts almost 32 hours with ANC on.
It offers extremely good passive isolation across the frequency range.
Supports multi-device pairing allowing simultaneous connection to computer and smartphone.
Battery lasts over 31 hours continuously with ANC on.
Can be used both wirelessly and via cable with virtually no latency when wired.
Out of the box, warm sound emphasizing thump and punch, with options to customize via graphic EQ and presets.
The companion app allows users to tailor sound preferences with robust customization options.
The WH-1000XM6 delivers very strong ANC performance, ranking among the top models in our ANC isolation charts.
Outstanding noise isolation, blocking out everything from the low airplane rumble to high-pitched A/C whine.
Lightweight with squishy earpads for long-term comfort.
negatives_detail: Not ideal for large ears due to smaller ear cup size.
A pronounced spike at 10 kHz in the frequency response is difficult to EQ away.
Its connection options feel dated compared to newer models.
Shallow ear cups can fail to form a proper seal, especially for glasses wearers, reducing noise cancelling effectiveness.

name: Anker Soundcore Life Q30
positives: V-shaped sound profile, adjustable via app.
Similar ANC performance to Space Q45, lower price.
Outstanding noise isolation in 'Transport' mode.
Well-built and comfortable for long commutes.
44 hours of continuous battery life.
Comfortable fit, 44 hours continuous battery life.
negatives: Leaks sound, disturbing nearby listeners.
ANC alters sound, boomy when off.
Leaks audio more than higher-end models.
notes: Primary URL failed (Best Buy Canada), fell back to PuriLite
positives_detail: V-shaped sound profile emphasizing thump and boom, adjustable via companion app.
ANC performance similar to the Space Q45 at a significantly lower price.
Using 'Transport' mode, outstanding noise isolation of rumbling engines and background chit-chat.
Well-built and comfortable for long commutes.
About 44 hours of continuous battery life.
Comfortable fit with about 44 hours of continuous battery life.
negatives_detail: Leaks quite a bit of sound, which may disturb nearby listeners.
ANC affects sound signature; audio can sound boomy and hollow when ANC is off.
Leaks much more audio than higher-end models, making music audible to bystanders.

name: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones
positives: Top noise-cancellation, $100 less than competitors.
Dynamic audio with punchy bass and clear treble.
Lightweight, comfortable for long wear, folds small.
negatives: 24-hour battery life is below average.
Sony WH-1000XM6 offers more detail and better balance.
positives_detail: These scored joint-top in my noise-cancellation tests, matching the Bose Ultra 2nd Gen and marginally beating the Sony WH-1000XM6, but can be found for around $100 less than those models.
These give you really punchy and dynamic audio, with big (but not overly heavy) bass, zinging treble, and great clarity through the mid-range.
They're very light, you can wear them for long periods without any fatigue, and they fold down small for travel.
negatives_detail: The 24-hour battery life is below average. If you want 30 hours, the Sony WH-1000XM6 or Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2nd Gen will give this to you with the same level of noise cancellation.
The Sony WH-1000XM6 offer a little more detail, a balance of bass/mid/treble that's closer to 'neutral', and a little better cohesion from bass through to mids.

name: Anker Soundcore Life Q20
positives: Comparable ANC to Q30 Wireless, lower price.
49 hours battery life with ANC on.
Solid ANC reduces engine noise and chatter.
Noise isolation nearly matches Space Q45.
Comfortable over-ear design, multi-device pairing.
Affordable price, reliable noise cancelling features.
negatives: Lacks adjustable ANC control and LDAC support found on higher-end Anker models.
ANC doesn't block as much bass-range noise as more expensive models.
positives_detail: Comparable ANC performance to the Q30 Wireless at a lower price.
49 hours of continuous battery life with ANC on, surpassing some pricier models.
Solid ANC performance that reduces engine noise and background chatter.
Noise isolation performance nearly matches the more expensive Space Q45, blocking engine rumble and ambient chatter.
Comfortable over-ear design with multi-device pairing support.
Affordable price with reliable noise cancelling features.

negatives: The non-folding design reduces portability for travelers and commuters.
They lack a customizable EQ, limiting fine-tuning of the audio.
positives_detail: The default audio tuning is well-balanced and scored impressively well in perceptual tests.
Provides good passive noise isolation thanks to well-fitting ear pads that reduce ambient noise.
Offers a comfortable fit with plush padding, battery life exceeding 31 hours, LDAC support, and wired USB audio connectivity.
Active noise canceling effectively nullifies low-frequency engine rumbles when commuting.

name: JBL Tour One M3
positives: Noise cancellation within 1-2% of AirPods Max.
SMART Tx accessory transmits audio via Auracast.
negatives: Price point may lack value against sales

positives_detail: They maintain noise cancelation performance within one to two percent of the Apple AirPods Max.
It includes a SMART Tx accessory that can transmit audio over Auracast to multiple devices or provide analog input via USB.
negatives_detail: The feature set and price point may not justify a pure value buy compared to sale prices on competing models.
Sound quality is lacking compared to other top-range models, requiring EQ adjustments or the SMART Tx accessory to improve clarity.

name: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones (2nd Generation)
positives: Reduced bus, train, airplane noise significantly
Large ear pads provide excellent passive noise isolation
Premium audio quality, wireless support for Snapdragon Sound, aptX Lossless
negatives: The companion app is simplistic, lacking advanced customization features.
positives_detail: The headphones reduced bus engine, train screech, and airplane noise significantly, blocking a great amount of ambient noise across the entire frequency range in testing.
The large dense ear pads create an excellent seal on the head, providing excellent passive noise isolation.
They feature premium audio quality at a competitive price, along with wireless connectivity support for Snapdragon Sound and aptX Lossless.

name: Apple AirPods Max (2nd Generation)
positives: Hybrid active noise cancelation for optimal attenuation.
Adaptive EQ adjusts frequency response in real time.
negatives: High cost reduces accessibility compared to competitors.
Supports SBC and AAC codecs only, no LDAC.
positives_detail: The hybrid active noise cancelation system provides optimal noise attenuation among the best pure noise cancellers tested.
They support Adaptive EQ, adjusting frequency response in real time based on fit to maintain consistent sound quality.
negatives_detail: Their high cost makes them a less accessible option compared to similarly performing competitors.
They support only SBC and AAC codecs, lacking higher-bitrate options like LDAC.

name: Puro Sound Labs PuroQuiet
positives: They are affordable, sleek, and designed to fit smaller heads.
They limit maximum volume to help protect children's hearing.

name: Sony WH-CH720N
positives: App support

name: ov202w Wireless Over-Ear Headphones
positives: Dual dynamic 40mm and 10mm drivers deliver audio
Hybrid ANC reduces external noise
Crafted from sustainable wood and recycled plastic
Soft memory foam and adjustable headband for comfort
Up to 104 hours without ANC, 80 hours with ANC
negatives: Less intuitive touch controls than physical buttons.
Occasional Bluetooth pairing issues with devices.

Heavier than some over-ear headphones.
Higher price than competitors.
positives_detail: High-quality sound: Dual dynamic two-way 40mm and 10mm drivers deliver rich and detailed audio.
Effective noise cancellation: Hybrid ANC technology effectively reduces external noise.
Sustainable materials: Crafted from sustainably sourced wood and recycled plastic.
Comfortable design: Soft memory foam ear pads and adjustable headband ensure extended comfort.
Exceptional battery life: Up to 104 hours without ANC and 80 hours with ANC on a single charge.
negatives_detail: Touch controls: Some users may find touch controls less intuitive than physical buttons.
Bluetooth connectivity: Occasional pairing issues with certain devices.
Limited availability: Not widely available in Canadian retailers.
Weight: Slightly heavier than some other over-ear headphones, which may affect comfort during prolonged use.
Price point: Higher than some competitors in the market.
